stemHtml: Which weather development has to be expected by a pilot who flies from the East towards a stable warm front which is approaching from the West?

options.a: At approximately 800 km ahead of the surface front there is overcast cirrostratus the cloud base lowers to become a typical overcast altostratus and finally a nimbostratus. At approximately 300 km ahead of the surface front, the aircraft encounters rain which intensifies.
options.b: At approximately 800 km ahead of the surface front there is overcast cirrostratus the cloud base lowers to become a typical overcast altostratus and finally a nimbostratus. At approximately 300 km ahead of the surface front, showers and CB clouds form.
options.c: At approximately 800 km ahead of the surface front there is overcast cirrostratus the cloud base lowers to become a typical overcast altostratus and finally a nimbostratus. At approximately 300 km ahead of the surface front, persistent precipitation takes place.
options.d: At approximately 800 km ahead of the surface front there is overcast cirrostratus the cloud base lowers to Cumulonimbus clouds. Fog occurs behind the front.
